name: Linen-Blend Midi Dress
description: Breezy midi-length dress in a soft linen-cotton blend. Features a flattering wrap-inspired bodice, adjustable waist tie, and side slits for easy movement. The perfect warm-weather dress for brunch, garden parties, and summer weddings.
specs: 55% linen 45% organic cotton, 160 GSM lightweight fabric, Wrap-inspired bodice with snap closure for security, Adjustable self-tie waist belt, Side slits for ease of movement, Midi length (hits mid-calf on most heights), Machine wash cold gentle cycle, Hang dry recommended, Sizes 0-16 regular
warranty: 30-day return window. Dresses can be returned if unworn with tags. Free size exchanges.
shipping: Free standard shipping on all orders over $50. Standard delivery 3-5 business days. Express 1-2 day shipping available for $9.99.
